title: Department Manager Vacancy at Reliance Retail - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Department Manager Vacancy at Reliance Retail - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Reliance Retail invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Department Manager at our Patna location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About Reliance Retail:
Reliance Retail is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Assist in recruiting, onboarding, and performance management of staff
• Handle customer queries, complaints, and escalations effectively
• Monitor inventory levels and coordinate replenishment activities
• Build relationships with regular customers to drive loyalty
• Manage store operations to ensure smooth daily functioning
• Implement promotional activities and in-store campaigns
• Ensure compliance with company policies and retail regulations

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Inventory Management
• Proficiency in POS Systems
• Proficiency in KPI Management
• Proficiency in Loss Prevention
• Proficiency in Sales Techniques
• Proficiency in Visual Merchandising
• Proficiency in Supply Chain
• Proficiency in Team Leadership

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Professional development and training programs
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Patna, Bihar, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Reliance Retail!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
